candidates.row_label: Depreciation, amortization and impairment losses, net
candidates.why: Separate operating D&A-looking summary row above financial lines, but it also includes impairment and is not specifically tied to cost of sales; adding it to COGS would risk misallocation and non-D&A contamination.

Explicit operating depreciation row shown separately from the selected COGS component rows, suggesting it is not embedded in those selected rows; however, there is no indication it belongs specifically to COGS rather than broader operating expenses.
Explicit operating amortization row shown separately from the selected COGS component rows, but it is not labeled as cost-of-sales related, so assigning it to COGS would be uncertain.

variables.notes: A separate operating D&A line exists, so D&A may sit outside the selected COGS component bucket. However, the excerpt provides no bucket-specific evidence that the standalone Depreciation/Amortization belongs to COGS rather than SG&A or mixed operating expenses. Conservative output is empty to avoid misallocation and double counting.
